task_completion.description: Create a title slide referencing 'SEV-1' and 'US-East'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A presentation slide (likely the first one) containing the text 'SEV-1' and 'US-East' in the title or subtitle.

task_completion.description: Create an executive summary slide including impact and downtime
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide summarizing the incident, specifically containing the downtime duration '45 minutes'.

task_completion.description: Create a timeline slide with UTC timestamps
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide detailing the sequence of events, containing the specific timestamps '14:02', '14:15', and '14:32'.

task_completion.description: Create a root cause analysis slide that includes the architecture diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide discussing the root cause (look for the text 'BGP') that visibly contains an inserted image of a network/architecture diagram.

task_completion.description: Create a remediation action items slide with specific Jira ticket IDs
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide listing action items that explicitly includes the Jira ticket IDs 'NET-1092', 'SRE-4401', and 'SRE-4402'.

task_completion.description: The presentation must contain exactly 5 slides
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnail pane on the left side of the presentation software shows exactly 5 slides.
The presentation software's title bar shows 'sev1_postmortem.pptx', or a save dialog/file manager confirms the file is saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical presentation application (like ONLYOFFICE or LibreOffice Impress) to create the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the UI of a presentation software being actively used, rather than terminal commands generating the .pptx file via scripts.

integrity.description: The architecture diagram was actually inserted as an image into the slide.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram is rendered visually on the slide canvas, not just referenced by its file path in a text box.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application to build the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the agent adding new slides, typing text, or inserting images, rather than just opening a pre-existing completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/sev1_postmortem.pptx'. The presentation must contain the following verified text elements across its slides: 'SEV-1', 'US-East', '45 minutes' (downtime), '14:02', '14:15', '14:32' (timestamps), 'BGP' (root cause), 'NET-1092', 'SRE-4401', and 'SRE-4402' (Jira tickets).
